def make_parser(language: Language) -> Parser:
    parser = Parser()
    parser.set_language(language)
    return parser

DEFAULT_LANGUAGES = ("python", "sql", "yaml", "javascript", "typescript")
def build_languages(
    vendor_dir: str | Path = "vendor",
    out_path: str | Path = "build/my-languages.so",
    languages: Iterable[str] | None = None,
    force: bool = False,
) -> Path:
    vendor_path = Path(vendor_dir)
    out_path = Path(out_path)
    out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

label: graph_to_json_data
write_graph_json
peekOfCode:
def write_graph_json(graph: nx.DiGraph, path: str | Path) -> None:
    output_path = Path(path)
    output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    data = graph_to_json_data(graph)
    output_path.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

peekOfCode:
def ollama_extract_cmd(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
    code = Path(args.file).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    response = extract_python_symbols(code, model=args.model)
    print(response)
def _parse_args(argv: list[str]) -> argparse.Namespace:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Codebase Cartography CLI")
    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)
    clone_parser = subparsers.add_parser("clone", help="Clone a target repository")
    clone_parser.add_argument("repo_url", help="Git repository URL")
    clone_parser.add_argument("--target-dir", default="target_repo")
